faq.title: Key Questions Before You Buy
faq.description: Pricing, credits, cancellation, refunds, and commercial use explained clearly before checkout.

items.question: What is the difference between credit packs and membership?
items.answer: Credit packs are one-time purchases with no auto-renewal, making them a good fit for trying the product, topping up, or project-based work. Memberships renew automatically on a monthly or yearly basis, but usually offer a lower cost per creation and are better for ongoing use.

items.question: Do credits expire?
items.answer: One-time credit packs stay valid for 12 months from the purchase date. Membership credits are issued for the current billing cycle and expire or refresh at the end of that cycle. You can check your remaining balance and expiration time on the billing and credits pages.

items.question: Does canceling a subscription take effect immediately?
items.answer: No. You can cancel at any time, and the cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. Until then, you can continue using the benefits included in your current plan.

items.question: How many credits does it take to generate one image?
items.answer: Standard 1K text-to-image starts at 40 credits, and standard 1K image-to-image starts at 60 credits. Higher-resolution outputs and pro modes cost more. The examples on the pricing page are useful references, but the final amount shown inside the creator should be treated as the source of truth.

items.question: Can the current plans be used commercially?
items.answer: Yes. All plans currently shown on the pricing page include commercial usage rights. You still need to make sure you have the legal right to use any uploaded assets, likenesses, brand elements, music, and voice content, and that your usage complies with the platform terms.

items.question: Do you offer refunds?
items.answer: Under the current terms of service, payments are generally non-refundable unless required by law or approved by the platform. If you experience duplicate charges or a system error, contact support@gpt-image-2-ai.org as soon as possible.

items.question: Will prices increase later? Does yearly billing lock in the price?
items.answer: We may adjust pricing over time as model capabilities, infrastructure costs, and features change. Yearly plans are a better fit if you want to lock in your annual creation costs in advance. Active subscriptions will continue to be honored for the current billing cycle.

items.question: What if I need higher limits or team purchasing?
items.answer: If you need higher usage limits, centralized team purchasing, support for large batch creation, or a longer-term project plan, contact us at support@gpt-image-2-ai.org and tell us what you need.

pricing.title: ChatGPT Image 2 Generator Plan
pricing.description: Get started with ChatGPT Image 2 Generator for AI image generation and editing. Standard 1K text-to-image starts at 40 credits, and standard 1K image-to-image starts at 60 credits.
